overall.description: A maritime simulation game showing a first-person view from a ship's bridge navigating through choppy open waters during overcast dusk conditions. The vessel's instrumentation including radar, electronic charts, and depth sounders are visible as the bow cuts through moderate seas.

agents.ego_description: piloting the vessel through moderate seas while monitoring the radar and navigation displays from the bridge

entered.detail: circular radar screen with rotating yellow sweep arm showing surrounding contacts
electronic navigation chart with yellow landmasses and vessel position marker
orange-tinted digital display showing water depth and sonar data
metal bow deck with safety railings and anchor equipment visible through the bridge windows
choppy dark blue sea surface extending to the overcast horizon
metal safety railing along the left side of the vessel bow
metal safety railing along the right side of the vessel bow

segments.scene_description: The view from a ship's bridge shows the vessel moving steadily through choppy open waters under an overcast dusk sky. Navigation instruments including a rotating radar, electronic chart, and depth sounder are visible overhead while the bow cuts through the moderate seas, with metal railings framing the forward view of the dark ocean horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates through a moody, overcast maritime environment. It begins with a view of the vessel cutting through choppy open waters, where the dark ocean horizon is framed by sturdy metal railings. As the ship moves forward, the camera captures the rhythmic motion of the bow slicing through moderate seas under the dim light of dusk. The scene then integrates the technical atmosphere of the bridge, revealing the glow of navigation instruments including a rotating radar, electronic charts, and depth sounders overhead.
